nasb.text: Although you wash yourself with lye And use much soap, The stain of your iniquity is before Me,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: Though you wash yourself with lye and use much soap, the stain of your guilt is still before me, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 你雖然用鹼洗滌， 多加肥皂， 你罪孽的污漬仍留在我面前。” 這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 纵然你用碱和许多肥皂清洗， 你在我面前仍然罪迹斑斑。” 这是主耶和华说的。
